The [[Fabreth Medical Biochemicals]] '''Shock Cloth''' was an emergency anti-shock blanket. It was a thermal blanket that had hundreds of tiny injectors and a small supply of medical chemicals. When it was connected to a datapad or medical scanner, it could inject medicine to specific parts of a patient's body while stabilizing the body temperature.<ref name="A&E" />

It had enough chemicals for five uses before it needed to be restocked. A typical restocking cost would be fifty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="A&E" />
